description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular body with two large, rectangular engine pods mounted on either side, each displaying prominent vent grilles and blue-lit panels. The central fuselage is heavily armored, with a cockpit area that appears reinforced and a nose section that tapers to a point. Orange accent markings are visible on the engine pods and body, adding visual contrast to the predominantly matte black exterior. The rear section is compact, with what appear to be thruster or exhaust ports, and the underside is reinforced for durability. The vehicle is equipped with multiple weapon mounts, including side-mounted missile pods and forward-facing barrels. Its design suggests a focus on urban combat, with heavy armor and advanced propulsion systems for maneuverability.
description: A heavily armored, matte black combat vehicle with large side engine pods, blue-lit panels, orange accents, and visible weapon mounts. Its angular design and reinforced body suggest urban tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dual engine pods with blue-lit panels and the reinforced central cockpit area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the engine pod's vent grilles, orange markings, and the compact rear section.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the vented engine intakes, missile pods, and the tapered armored body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing engine pod details and the vehicle's angular profile.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two side-mounted missile pods on the outer edges of the engine pods, and forward-facing barrel mounts integrated into the front fuselage.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with visible thick, angular panels covering the entire vehicle, especially reinforced around the cockpit and engine pods.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte black with orange accent markings and blue-lit panels; no camouflage pattern present.
